texto: How did you… never mind. I keep forgetting you are a demon and can travel anywhere in the blink of an eye.”
autor: “And don’t you forget it. Anything you desire can be yours in a matter of moments.
explicacao: Citação de “And don’t you forget it. Anything you desire can be yours in a matter of moments. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “How did you… never mind.
